Season ZeroVoteSeason Zero
1. USDe holders are invited to vote!

PT-eUSDe-AUGUST2025 holders may receive a 1.25x Asset Multiplier by voting for the Pendle Pool. Whilst Morpho eUSDE holders can vote for the Morpho Market in order to also claim a 1.15x Asset Multiplier.

Once the voting window closes the rewards proposal will end and all voters will receive their Asset(s) Multiplier.

Final voting round

Fri May 29 2025 22:00:00 GMT-0700

Amount of voters: 72

Total Incentives: ~$618,431.55

Total Rewards: ~$5,130,029.87

Total eUSDe Distribution
$18,452,552.90
